allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); paths={k:v for k,v in d['paths'].items\(\) if 'user' in k or 'me' in k or 'auth' in k}; print\(json.dumps\(paths, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); schemas=d['components']['schemas']; targets=['AuthUserRead','UserTeamMembershipRead','TeamMembershipRoleRead']; print\(json.dumps\({k:schemas[k] for k in targets if k in schemas}, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); schemas=d['components']['schemas']; targets=['AuthTeamMembershipRead']; print\(json.dumps\({k:schemas[k] for k in targets if k in schemas}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if k != 'client'}, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if any\(x in k.lower\(\) for x in ['email','code','signin','sign_in','link','google','send','verify']\)}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); keys=[k for k in d if not k.startswith\('@'\)]; print\(json.dumps\({k:d[k] for k in keys}, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(xargs -I{} sh -c 'echo "=== {} ==="; python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(open\(\\"$1\\"\)\); print\(json.dumps\({k:d[k] for k in d if not k.startswith\(\\"@\\"\)}, indent=2\)\)" "$1"' _ {})

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p['package'],p.get\('resolvable',{}\).get\('version','?'\)\) for p in d.get\('packages',[]\) if p['package'] in \('firebase_auth','firebase_core'\)]")
